title: DAZN | Argentina squad for 2026 World Cup: All players, captain, shirt numbers and Lionel Scaloni's coaching staff
original_text:
Argentina squad for 2026 World Cup: All players, captain, shirt numbers and Lionel Scaloni's coaching staff
Argentina squad for 2026 World Cup: All players, captain, shirt numbers and Lionel Scaloni's coaching staff
Watch World Cup archive & programmes FREE on DAZN
Argentina will look to become the first nation to retain the World Cup since Brazil in 1962, when they head to North America to defend their crown.
To aid him, Lionel Scaloni has picked his 26-man squad, and it does include Lionel Messi, who competes in his sixth and final World Cup tournament.
The 2026 World Cup, from June 11 to July 19, is an expanded format with 48 national teams now competing, originally divided into 12 groups.
Argentina will face Algeria, Austria and Jordan in Group J , starting on Tuesday, 16 June, when they begin against Algeria.
All squads are provisional until FIFA announces the final list of 26 players, following the submission of applications by the participating teams on June 2.
Lionel Scaloni announced his final squad on May 28.
Shirt Number* Position Player
1 Goalkeeper Juan Musso (Atletico Madrid)
12 Goalkeeper Geronimo Rulli (Marseille
23 Goalkeeper Emiliano Martinez (Aston Villa)
2 Defender Leonardo Balerdi (Marseille)
3 Defender Nicolas Tagliafico (Lyon)
4 Defender Gonzalo Montiel (River Plate)
6 Defender Lisandro Martinez (Manchester United)
19 Defender Nicolas Otamendi (Benfica)
13 Defender Cristian Romero (Tottenham)
25 Defender Facundo Medina (Marseille)
26 Defender Nahuel Molina (Atletico Madrid)
5 Midfielder Leandro Paredes (River Plate)
7 Midfielder Rodrigo de Paul (Inter Miami)
14 Midfielder Ezequiel Palacios (Bayer Leverkusen)
20 Midfielder Alexis Mac Allister (Liverpool)
8 Midfielder Enzo Fernandez (Chelsea)
9 Forward Julian Alvarez (Atletico Madrid)
10 Forward Lionel Messi (Inter Miami) - captain
15 Forward Nicolas Gonzalez (Atletico Madrid)
16 Forward Thiago Almada (Atletico Madrid)
17 Forward Giuliano Simeone (Atletico Madrid)
18 Forward Nico Paz (Como)
21 Forward Jose Manuel Lopez (Palmeiras)
22 Forward Lautaro Martinez (Inter Milan)
*Shirt numbers not yet assigned.
Argentina coaching staff for 2026 World Cup
This is the Argentina coaching staff for the 2026 World Cup:
Name Role
Lionel Scaloni Head Coach
Pablo Aimar Assistant Coach
Roberto Ayala Assistant Coach
Walter Samuel Assistant Coach
Martin Tocalli Goalkeeping Coach
Luis Martin Fitness Coach
​ DAZN/FIFA
